---
title: "Arash Bagherabadi"
---

::: {.content}
::: {.profile-image}
![](images/profile.PNG){.profile-pic}
:::

## About

I am a highly motivated PhD student at the University of Alabama at Birmingham, with growing experience in B cell biology in infection and regulatory T cell biology across cancer and obesity contexts. I'm actively building expertise in single-cell and spatial transcriptomics, bioinformatics pipelines, and machine learning, with a strong interest in their application to vaccines and immunotherapy. 

## Contact

<div class="contact-grid">
  <section class="contact-group" aria-labelledby="contact-email">
    <h3 id="contact-email">Email</h3>
    <a class="contact-row" href="mailto:abaghera@uab.edu" aria-label="Email Arash Bagherabadi at UAB">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-envelope" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      <span>
        <span class="contact-label">UAB email</span>
        <span class="contact-value">abaghera@uab.edu</span>
      </span>
    </a>
    <a class="contact-row" href="mailto:arash.bagherabadi@gmail.com" aria-label="Email Arash Bagherabadi at personal email">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-envelope" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      <span>
        <span class="contact-label">Personal email</span>
        <span class="contact-value">arash.bagherabadi@gmail.com</span>
      </span>
    </a>
  </section>
  <section class="contact-group" aria-labelledby="contact-profiles">
    <h3 id="contact-profiles">Profiles</h3>
    <a class="contact-row" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/arashbagherabadi" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Arash Bagherabadi on LinkedIn">
      <i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      <span>
        <span class="contact-label">LinkedIn</span>
        <span class="contact-value">arashbagherabadi</span>
      </span>
    </a>
    <a class="contact-row" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Jk-OzNQAAAAJ&amp;hl=en" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Arash Bagherabadi on Google Scholar">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      <span>
        <span class="contact-label">Google Scholar</span>
        <span class="contact-value">Arash Bagherabadi</span>
      </span>
    </a>
    <a class="contact-row" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3036-5687" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Arash Bagherabadi ORCID profile">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-id-card" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      <span>
        <span class="contact-label">ORCID</span>
        <span class="contact-value">0000-0003-3036-5687</span>
      </span>
    </a>
    <a class="contact-row" href="https://github.com/arashabadi" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Arash Bagherabadi on GitHub">
      <i class="fa-brands fa-github" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      <span>
        <span class="contact-label">GitHub</span>
        <span class="contact-value">arashabadi</span>
      </span>
    </a>
    <a class="contact-row" href="https://x.com/arash_b_abadi" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Arash Bagherabadi on X">
      <i class="fa-brands fa-x-twitter" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      <span>
        <span class="contact-label">X</span>
        <span class="contact-value">@arash_b_abadi</span>
      </span>
    </a>
  </section>
</div>

<button class="theme-toggle" type="button" onclick="toggleTheme()" aria-label="Switch theme">
  {{< fa sun >}}
  {{< fa moon >}}
</button>

::: {.footer}
© 2025 Arash Bagherabadi. All rights reserved.
Built using [Quarto](https://quarto.org/) {{< fa heart >}} 
:::

:::
